title: Proclamation No. 416, s. 2000
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 416

DISESTABLISHING THE TOWNSITE RESERVATION COVERED UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 345 DATED JANUARY 7, 1965, WHICH ESTABLISHED FOR TOWNSITE PURPOSES OF THE MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT OF OLUTANGA A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF SUBANIPA, MUNICIPALITY OF OLUTANGA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources, and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA, President of the Philippines, do hereby revoke Proclamation No. 345 dated January 7, 1965, and disestablish the townsite reservation established therein covering a parcel of land more particularly described as follows:

A parcel of land (as shown on plan MR-1192), situated in the barrio of Subanipa, Municipality of Olutanga, Province of Zamboanga del Sur.

Bounded on the N. and W., along lines 1-2-3-4, by Lot 682 and along line 4-5, by Lot 681, both of Olutanga Public Land Subdivision, Pls-562; on the N. along line 5-6, by property of Imam, along line 6-7, by property of Pantaleon Benauro, along line 7-8, by existing road and along line 8-9, by property of Pantaleon Benauro; on the N, E, and NE, along lines 9-10-11-12-13-14, by property of Imam Bondang; on the SE, N, E, SE, and S; along lines from Corner 14, thence following the meandering boundary to Corner 32, by Moro Gulf; on the SW; along lines 32-33-34, by Lot 834 and along line 34-35, by Lot 831, and on the W., along line 35-36, by Lot 830 and along lines 36-37-1, by lot 324, all of Olutanga Public Land Subdivision, Pls 562. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan being S. 18 deg. 01 min. W., 6062.57 meters from B.L.L.M. 1, Olutanga. Pls 562, thence S 36 deg. 50 min. E., 209.80 meters to point 2; thence N. 2 deg. 04 min. E., 321.24 meters to point 3; thence N. 1 deg. 28 min. E., 144.08 meters to point 4; thence N. 1 deg. 11 min. E., 73.74 meters to point 5; thence S. 74 deg. 45 min. E., 43.44 meters to point 6; thence S. 87 deg. 05 min. E., 111.66 meters to point 7; thence N. 84 deg. 28 min. E., 8.60 meters to point 8; thence S. 88 deg. 56 min. E., 76.26 meters to point 9; thence S. 87 deg. 42 min. E., 379.99 meters to point 10; thence S. 87 deg. 00 min. E., 35.04 meters to point 11; thence S. 9 deg. 32 min. W., 32.16 meters to point 12; thence S. 10 deg. 45 min. W., 42.66 meters to point 13; thence S. 68 deg. 24 min. E., 281.42 meters to point 14; thence S. 67 deg. 30 min. W., 93.57 meters to point 15, thence S. 54 deg. 20 min. W., 123.12 meters to point 16; thence S. 62 deg. 01 min. E., 47.13 meters to point 17; thence N. 81 deg. 25 min. E., 191.46 meters to point 18; thence N. 76 deg. 46 min. E., 189.02 meters to point 19; thence S. 44 deg. 57 min. E., 28.13 meters to point 20; thence S. 20 deg. 10 min. W., 120.49 meters to point 21; thence S. 62 deg. 23 min. W., 132.71 meters to point 22; thence S. 52 deg. 17 min. W., 155.56 meters to point 23; thence S. 71 deg. 45 min. W., 198.78 meters to point 24; thence S. 31 deg. 59 min. W., 300.65 meters to point 25; thence S. 10 deg. 20 min. W., 35.85 meters to point 26; thence S. 78 deg. 04 min. W., 108.31 meters to point 27; thence S. 61 deg. 26 min. W., 121.55 meters to point 28; thence S. 14 deg. 16 min. W., 167.10 meters to point 29; thence 58 min. W., 183.19 meters to point 30; thence S. 75 deg. 41 min. W., 120.10 meters to point 31; thence N. 15 deg. 25 min. W., 109.52 meters to point 32; thence N. 39 deg. 06 min. W., 127.80 meters to point 33; thence N. 32 deg. 25 min. W., 63.93 meters to point 34; thence N. 1 deg. 50 min. W., 201.90 meters to point 35; thence N. 0 deg. 12 min. E., 316.27 meters to point 36; thence N. 4 deg. 07 min. W., 3.21 meters to point of beginning; containing an area of NINE HUNDRED FORTY SEVEN THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED NINETY EIGHT (947,498) SQUARE METERS .

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: point 6 cross on stone; point 10-31, inclusive, by stakes; and the rest, by P.L.S. cyl. Conc. Mons., bearing true; date of survey May 22, 1962 to September 10, 1962 and approved on December 17, 1964.

The above-described area is hereby declared open for disposition in favor of the actual occupants under the provisions of R.A. 730 in relation to the provisions of C.A. 141 otherwise known as the Public Land Act.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 21 st day of November, in the year of Our Lord, two thousand.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA

By the President: (Sgd.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
